name: Teisen Sir Fon (Anglesey Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and lard until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg to the mixture, mixing well.
3. Dissolve the bicarbonate of soda in milk.
4. Gradually add the flour, treacle, mixed spice and ginger mixture, dried fruit, and salt to the creamed mixture. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
5. Grease a baking tin and pour the batter into it.
6. Bake for 3/4 hour at Gas Mark 5 (375°F).
7. Allow the cake to cool before slicing and serving.
Alternate:
1. Combine 3 cups flour, 1 cup butter, 1 cup sugar, 2 tbsp baking powder, 2 eggs, milk, mixed spice, ginger, and dried fruit in a bowl.
2. Mix until well combined, ensuring the batter is stiff but not dry.
3. Fill two sandwich tins with the mixture.
4. Bake for 30-40 minutes at Gas Mark 5 (375°F).
5. Cut into slices, spread butter on top, and serve warm.
